subtopicMappings.description: No canonical node for drawing diagrams from written descriptions.
No canonical node for perpendicular from a point to a line or perpendicular at a point.
No canonical node for loci or equidistant points.
No canonical node for circle vocabulary (centre, radius, chord, diameter, tangent, arc, sector, segment).
No canonical node for plans and elevations of 3D solids.
No canonical node for relative frequency or experimental probability.
No canonical node for relative frequency approaching theoretical probability.
No canonical node for identifying or handling outliers.
